title: Gentle Steamed Algerian Eggplant Tagine
description: A salty, pillowy, post-workout Algerian dish featuring plum sauce, this ovo-vegetarian friendly recipe is perfect for a snack or light meal. The combination of steamed eggplant and plum sauce creates a unique and delicious flavor profile.
instructions: Preheat the steamer to 200 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, toss the eggplant cubes with olive oil, garlic, salt, and black pepper until they are evenly coated.
Place the eggplant mixture in a ramekin and steam for 15 minutes or until the eggplant is tender.
In a small bowl, whisk together the plum sauce and eggs.
Pour the plum sauce mixture over the steamed eggplant and steam for an additional 5 minutes.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve hot.
Let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
Serve in the ramekin for a beautiful presentation.
